name: Whitsunday Blue Private Charter
description: Experience the Whitsundays in exclusive comfort and style aboard the Whitsunday Blue. This private charter offers personalized adventures for those seeking a unique and luxurious exploration of the Whitsunday Islands. Ideal for couples, families, and groups looking to create unforgettable memories in a serene and picturesque setting.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
departure_times: Departs 12:00 PM on Tue, Thu & Sat
includes:
Private charter experience
Personalized itinerary
Experienced crew
highlights:
Sail through the stunning Whitsunday Islands
Luxurious and private sailing experience
Flexible itinerary tailored to your preferences
Opportunities for snorkeling and beach visits
Ideal for special occasions or intimate gatherings
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Couples, families, and groups seeking a private and luxurious sailing experience
important_information: ['Children under the age of 18 years are considered upon enquiry (no infants).', 'Whitsunday Blue does not supply child sized equipment such as wetsuits, snorkelling gear or life jackets.', 'It is the responsibility of the parent/guardian to ensure these are obtained from elsewhere beforehand and brought on board for departure.', 'For safety reasons ALL passengers must be able to swim and speak fluent English.']
what_to_bring: ['Change of clothes', 'Swimwear', 'Toiletries', 'Insect repellent', 'Water bottle to refill', 'Camera', 'Comfortable walking shoes', 'Sun protection (sunscreen, hat, sunnies etc.)', 'Warm clothes/pullover for evenings (seasonal)']
whats_extra: ["Alcohol (BYO - refer to 'What to Bring' for more info.)", 'Additional snorkel equipment (prescription masks etc.)', 'Children equipment (life jackets, stingersuits, fins, masks, etc.)*', 'Peak holiday seasons (i.e. Christmas, Easter, New Years) may incur a surcharge.', 'Tours at sea between the 24th of December to the 2nd of January will incur a local payment once-off fee of $20 per person per night, payable direct at check in.', 'Tours departing on Easter Friday, Saturday, Sunday or Monday will incur a once-off fee of $20 per person per night, payable direct at check in.']
cancellation_policy: ['All cancellations forfeit the non-refundable deposit.', 'All balance payments are due 2 months prior to departure.', 'Failure to pay the remaining balance before this scheduled date will result in termination of the charter and forfeit of the non-refundable deposit.', 'Once the balance payment has been made, no shows and client cancellations made within 30 days of departure forfeit 100% of the full ticket price.']
